arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney sets Plymouth Argyle new challenge ahead of Bristol City clash at Ashton Gate
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has challenged his Plymouth Argyle side to avoid conceding early on against Bristol City following the Pilgrims' disappointing defeat to Norwich City at Carrow Road last time out. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney's true thoughts about football management as Coleen makes claim
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney is in the midst of his fourth managerial stint in as many years with Plymouth Argyle in the Championship, and wife Coleen has spoken out on his job while on ITV's I'm A Celebrity

arts.ttl: Palsson dropped: Plymouth Argyle team news and predicted XI to face Bristol City
arts.sum: The latest Plymouth Argyle team news as Wayne Rooney's side gear up to face Bristol City in the Championship. The post Palsson dropped: Plymouth Argyle team news and predicted XI to face Bristol City appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Bristol City team news ahead of Plymouth Argyle as Liam Manning sheds light on Sam Bell return
arts.sum: Liam Manning has admitted Sam Bell isn't "far away" from making a return to first-team action ahead of Bristol City's showdown with Plymouth Argyle at Ashton Gate. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: Every word Liam Manning said on Bristol City vs Plymouth, lack of goals, Wayne Rooney and more
arts.sum: It was aggressive, played on the front foot, everything that I'd want our team to look like, just lacked that final bit to either create a really good goal-scoring opportunity or lacked a little detail when we did get into terrific goal-scoring positions. Bristol City host Plymouth Argyle on Saturday in the Championship as they look to get back to winning ways in the league having lost back-to-back games since the November international break.
Jamie Griffith has provided a score prediction for all 12 matches taking place in the Championship this weekend.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning lifts lid on Harry Cornick's position at Bristol City after 'honest' summer talks
arts.sum: Some supporters have been quick to suggest Manning should be turning to Cornick ahead of both new look forwards when the Robins are chasing a goal and the City boss admitted that could happen in the coming weeks. Liam Manning has admitted he held conversations with Harry Cornick about leaving Bristol City in the summer but insists he remains an available option ahead of Saturday's meeting with Plymouth Argyle.

arts.ttl: Marcus McGuane on Bristol City 'responsibility', Ashton Gate record and Plymouth Argyle test
arts.sum: "Obviously Joe is an excellent player and was playing beforehand," McGuane said in his pre-match press conference. "Obviously I've played against them a lot of times and they're fantastic players," the 25-year-old said.

arts.ttl: Jason Knight details key factor Bristol City squad is missing ahead of Plymouth Argyle clash
arts.sum: Although Bristol City flexed their attacking muscles earlier in the season as they put four goals past Millwall at Ashton Gate and three past Preston at Deepdale, in their two games following the November international break they have looked toothless in the final third of the pitch despite creating several good scoring opportunities. Bristol City captain Jason Knight has challenged his teammates to find their "ruthless edge" in the final third following the Robins' disappointing defeat to Watford at Vicarage Road.
